response.overview: In a stormy coastal Florida radio station, weary late-night DJ Cameron Deep hosts "Moonlit Waves," a call-in show for wild conspiracy theories. Absurd tales pour in, from mind-controlling self-driving cars to interdimensional clown aliens in smart fridges. When a mysterious static signal interrupts, revealing a chilling message from ancient "Subterraneans" claiming humanity was engineered as surface slaves, excitement turns to terror...
response.title: The Signal Beneath
